hero.title: Updates, prayer resources, and parish documents
hero.lede: Use this page for weekly highlights, parish news, newsletters, prayers, reflections, and diocesan or Vatican links.

intro.title: News and reflections in one place
intro.body: The first cards on this page are populated automatically from the editable news and newsletter collections.

cards.title: Weekly Highlights
paragraphs: Featured news items added in the CMS will appear here automatically.

cards.title: Parish Newsletters
paragraphs: Upload a PDF newsletter in the CMS and it will appear here and on the archive page automatically.

cards.title: Bidding Prayers
paragraphs: Use this area for short prayer resources, intercessions, or seasonal devotional material.

cards.title: Reflections
paragraphs: Add links here to parish reflections, homily notes, school reflections, or seasonal meditations.

cards.title: Vatican News / Pope
paragraphs: This section can link to official Catholic news sources, diocesan updates, or papal messages.
